zh.Buckenham, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆
zh.of Kingston up Hull, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾
zh.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Pole於大約1355年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾。她於1376年與Anthonye Dickensonne在英國英格蘭越可爾赫爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她於1376年住在英國英格蘭越可爾。她去世於1363年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆享年9歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Pole于大约1355年出生在英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾。她于1376年与Anthonye Dickensonne在英国英格兰越可爾赫爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她于1376年住在英国英格兰越可爾。她去世于1363年在英国英格兰諾福爾可巴肯哈姆享年9岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .
Americanized form of German   Pohle   or   Pohl  .

variants.name: Poles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Livio, Primo, Santo.
English and Welsh: variant of Pole and Powell + genitival or excrescent -s.
Italian (Friuli and Veneto): probably a derivative of the personal name   Polo  . It is also found in Slovenia.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Pole was born about 1355, in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Anthonye Dickensonne in 1376, in Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She lived in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom in 1376. She died in 1363, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 9.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Pole est née environ 1355, à Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Anthonye Dickensonne en 1376, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle a vécu à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1376. Elle est décédée en 1363, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 9 ans.

ja.of Kingston up Hull, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハル
ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Poleは約1355年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハルで生まれた。1376年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハルでAnthonye Dickensonneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1376年にはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアに住んでいた。彼女は1363年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで9歳で死去した。

ko.of Kingston up Hull, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Pole(은)는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 훌에서 Anthonye Dickensonne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1376년도에 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 살았다. 그녀는 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 벅함에서 9세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.of Kingston up Hull, Yorkshire, England: кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Pole родилась около 1355 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthonye Dickensonne в 1376 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она жила в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1376 году. Она умерла в 1363 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 9 лет.
